title: Vanillaish
description: A modpack made to add features that could be in vanilla Minecraft.
body:
This modpack was inspired from the Aged modpack, but I thought that it felt that is was missing some features and some features in it didn't feel like Minecraft. So I made my own modpack! This modpack was originaly created for my friends and I to play on a server together on.

If you ever felt that modpacks added or changed too much? This is the modpack for you! I added features that I feel should be in Minecraft.

If you have any problems or suggestions, then click the issues and make a issue on GitHub.  

## Features:
- **🌎 4 Seasons** - Be careful when you plant crops becuase in the wrong season you may not see returns.
- **📃 Inventory Improvements** - Have more inventory space, belt, and back slot.
- **🗻 Better Terrain Generation** - More biomes and improvements on vanilla biomes.
- **🏠 More Structures** - Better and more structures to find around your world!
- **🧱 New Blocks** - Improve your builds with new blocks!
- **🌟 Quality of Life** - Fixed bugs or added features for QOL!
- **➕ And much more!**
---

## How to make a server:
How to setup a server with the Vanillaish modpack:
- Download the Vanillaish .mrpack file from the versions page.
- Use [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install)

Or
Use [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads) and make sure you install Vanillaish as a server!
